auth.loginSubtitle: Make a new doc to bring your words, data, and teams together. For free
auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up now to start tracking your calculations and sync your devices.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: We sent a magic link to {{email}}. Please click the link, or copy the link/token and paste it below to sign in.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a temporary OTP code to reset your password.
auth.setNewPasswordSubtitle: Please enter the OTP sent to your email and choose your new password.

successMessages.passwordReset: Password reset successfully. Please sign in.

errors.emailAlreadyExists: This email address is already registered.
errors.invalidToken: Invalid or expired verification link or token.
errors.accountBlocked: Too many failed attempts. Please request a new OTP code.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
errors.userNotFound: User with this email address was not found.

validation.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.dobUnderage: You must be at least 13 years old
validation.dobInvalid: Please enter a valid birthdate in the past
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.tokenRequired: Verification link or token is required
